final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, poster-ready
Primary request: a Japanese high school girl in sailor uniform standing in front of a school building during cherry blossom season
Scene/backdrop: Japanese school campus with traditional school building, cherry blossom trees in full bloom, petals falling
Subject: teenage girl wearing classic Japanese sailor school uniform (seifuku), long dark hair gently blown by breeze, youthful and fresh appearance
Style/medium: soft film photography, Japanese youth magazine aesthetic, spring editorial
Composition/framing: medium shot, eye-level perspective, girl positioned slightly off-center with school building behind
Lighting/mood: bright sunny spring day, soft warm sunlight filtering through cherry blossoms, fresh and youthful atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink cherry blossoms + crisp white sailor uniform + warm sunlight + fresh green foliage
Materials/textures: delicate cherry blossom petals, crisp cotton uniform fabric, soft flowing hair strands
Constraints: maintain authentic Japanese school setting and uniform details, keep the fresh youthful vibe
Avoid: over-saturated colors, harsh shadows, Western school uniform, autumn/winter elements, watermark
